title_raw: The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985
title_normalized: The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985
content_raw:
The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985 

                        
                        
                    
                    
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                             (
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Ordinance
                                            
                                        
                                        NO. XVII OF 1985
                                    
                                

                                )

An Ordinance to repeal the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984.

                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                   	WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984 (XLVI of 1984);    	NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 24th March, 1982, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the President is pleased to make and promulgate the following Ordinance:-

An Ordinance to repeal the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984.

Short title
1. This Ordinance may be called the Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust (Repeal) Ordinance, 1985.

Repeal
2. The Ghousul Azam Abdul Qader Jillani Mosque Trust Ordinance, 1984 (XLVI of 1984), is hereby repealed.
